title: Allegro Microsystems Inc (ALGM) Q3 2026 Earnings Highlights
text: Allegro Microsystems exceeded expectations in Q3 2026, reporting revenue of $229 million, surpassing guidance highs. The company achieved non-GAAP EPS of $0.15, above the midpoint of projections, with gross margins at 49.9% and operating margins at 15.4%. Key metrics included net income of $29 million, operating cash flow of $45 million, and free cash flow of $41 million (representing 18% of quarterly sales). The company maintained a cash balance of $163 million against a term loan of $285 million. Growth was robust across divisions with Automotive showing 6% sequential and 28% year-over-year expansion. E-Mobility surged 46% year-over-year. Industrial and Other showed 11% sequential and 31% year-over-year growth. Data Center set a new quarterly record, up 31% sequentially. Power Products expanded 9% sequentially and 43% year-over-year. For Q4 2026, the company projects revenue between $230-240 million with gross margins of 49-51% and non-GAAP EPS guidance of $0.14-0.18 per share.
